title: Amulet Job Configuration
description:
Amulet job configuration file. Defines the compute target, Docker environment, code, data, storage, and jobs or hyperparameter search for an ML experiment.

Note: Amulet config files support `$CONFIG_DIR` (expands to the config file's directory), environment variable substitution (`$VAR` / `$$VAR` for remote), YAML anchors/aliases, and `!include` directives for file composition. These features operate at the YAML level and cannot be fully validated by this schema.

target.description: Compute target configuration. Can also be specified via CLI: `amlt run -t <target_name>`.

search.description: Hyperparameter search configuration. Use instead of `jobs` for HP sweeps.

jobs.description: List of job definitions to run. Use instead of `search` for fixed jobs.

storage.description: Named storage mounts. Keys are storage IDs (e.g. 'output', 'shared_data'). The special ID 'output' is used for job results.

env_defaults.description: Default values for environment variables. Keys are variable names; values are used only if the variable is not already set. Referenced via $VAR_NAME in the rest of the config.

name.description: Pre-configured target name from `amlt target list`. Usually sufficient on its own. Resolves to a Volcano namespace, Manifold VC, AML Compute cluster, or Azure Batch pool.

subscription_id.description: Azure subscription ID for the compute target.

resource_group.description: Azure resource group for the compute target.

workspace_subscription_id.description: Subscription ID for the workspace (if different from target).

workspace_resource_group.description: Resource group for the workspace (if different from target).

queue.description: Job queue name. Required for Volcano targets.

TargetSchema.description: Compute target configuration. In most cases, `name` from `amlt target list` is sufficient. For Manifold, a `workspace_name` must be set (here or in project settings). For Volcano, `queue` is typically required.

image.description: Docker image in format `registry/image:tag`. For Manifold base images, use `amlt-sing/<image_name>`. See available images with `amlt cache base-images`.

setup.description: Shell commands to run before the job starts (after MPI setup). Use $$VAR to pass environment variables literally. Example: `['pip install torch', 'apt-get update']`.

image_setup.description: Shell commands baked into a custom image layer (cost paid once, not on every job).

conda_yaml_file.description: Path to a conda environment YAML file.

skip_conda_packages_on_sing.description: Conda packages to skip when installing on Manifold (e.g. if the base image has a hardware-specific version).

env.description: Environment variables to set in the container.

local_dir.description: Local directory containing your code. Use `$CONFIG_DIR` for paths relative to the config file location. Example: `$CONFIG_DIR/src`.

ignore.description: Additional patterns to ignore during code upload (extends .amltignore). Example: `['*.pyc', '__pycache__/', 'data/']`.

parallel_trials.description: Number of parallel trials. Defaults to 1 for bayesian.

max_duration_hours.description: Maximum duration in hours. Defaults to 336 (2 weeks), max 1440 (60 days).

early_termination.description: Early termination policy string (e.g. 'BanditPolicy(slack_factor=0.15)'). Not supported with bayesian sampling.

name.description: Name of the metric to optimize (as logged by the training script).

HDMetricsSchema.description: Metric to optimize during hyperparameter search.

name.description: Parameter name, used as {name} in job_template commands.

values.description: Possible values for discrete/hyperdrive specs. Can be a list or a Hyperdrive expression like 'choice(1, 2, 3)' or 'uniform(0.01, 0.5)'.

name.description: Unique name for this job within the experiment.

sku.description: GPU SKU specification. Examples: 'G1' (1 GPU), 'G4' (4 GPUs), '2xG4' (2 nodes × 4 GPUs), 'NDv4:G2' (specific VM type with 2 GPUs).

process_count_per_node.description: Number of processes per node. Use -1 for one process per GPU. Set to 0 (default) for single process on head node.

mpi.description: Enable MPI distributed training. Requires process_count_per_node > 0.

identity.description: Identity type for the job: 'user' or 'managed'. On Volcano, set AMLT_VOLCANO_SERVICE_ACCOUNT in environment_variables to enable managed identity.

command.description: Shell commands to execute. Each list item is a separate command line. Commands run from the uploaded code directory (code.local_dir). Write outputs to $AMLT_OUTPUT_DIR for Amulet-managed results retrieval. Use $$VAR to pass environment variables literally (single $ is interpolated from the local environment at submission time).

tags.description: Tags for the job. Must start with a letter. Optional 'key:value' format with a colon separator.

preemptible.description: Whether the job can be preempted (Manifold/ARC).

max_run_duration_seconds.description: Maximum job run time in seconds.

container_args.description: Docker container arguments (e.g. shared memory size). Accepts arbitrary keys for docker CLI passthrough.

AMLT_DOCKERFILE_TEMPLATE.description: Controls Dockerfile generation for Manifold submissions. Set to 'default' to skip installer/validator, or 'none' to skip Dockerfile entirely. Only relevant for non-base images on Manifold.

DATASET_MOUNT_READ_BUFFER_BLOCK_COUNT.description: Number of blocks to cache when reading mounted data (Manifold). Default: 32.

DATASET_MOUNT_READ_BLOCK_SIZE.description: Size of each cache block in bytes when reading mounted data (Manifold). Default: 2MB.

DATASET_MOUNT_BLOCK_BASED_CACHE_ENABLED.description: Set to 'false' to cache whole files instead of blocks. Preferred for random access over many files (Manifold).

AMLT_DIRSYNC_FREQ.description: How often (seconds) to sync job output files to blob storage. Default: 30.

AMLT_DIRSYNC_MOVE.description: If 'true', files synced to blob storage are removed from local disk to save space.

AMLT_DIRSYNC_EXCLUDE.description: Space-separated patterns to exclude from background file sync to blob storage.

AMLT_DIRSYNC_INCLUDE.description: Space-separated patterns to include despite matching AMLT_DIRSYNC_EXCLUDE.

AMLT_DIRSYNC_THREADS.description: Max parallel threads for background file syncing. Default: unset (auto).

AMLT_NO_RUNTIME_DEPS.description: If 'true', skip installing runtime dependencies (azure-identity, wrapt, etc.) before running the job. May break HyperDrive job renaming and tensorboard patching.

AMLT_NO_FAULTHANDLER.description: If 'true', do not install Python faulthandler in AML/Manifold jobs.

AMLT_PERSISTENT_VOLUME_NAME.description: Mount a Kubernetes persistent volume claim (e.g. NFS) with this name at /data. Volcano only.

AMLT_PERSISTENT_VOLUME_MOUNT_DIR.description: Custom mount path for AMLT_PERSISTENT_VOLUME_NAME (default: /data). Volcano only.

AMLT_EXCLUDED_NODE_LIST.description: Comma-separated list of Kubernetes nodes to exclude from scheduling. Volcano only.

_AZUREML_SINGULARITY_JOB_UAI.description: Resource ID of a user-assigned managed identity to use in the job. Required for Manifold jobs. Allows the job to authenticate to Azure resources (storage, key vault, etc.) using this identity.

user.description: User to run the container as.

BashContainerArgsSchema.description: Docker container arguments. Known fields: user, shm_size, shm_size_per_gpu. Additional arbitrary keys are passed through to the Docker CLI.

container_name.description: Blob container name (3-63 chars, alphanumeric and dashes, no consecutive dashes). Mutually exclusive with `file_share_name`.

file_share_name.description: Azure Files share name. Mutually exclusive with `container_name`.

storage_account_name.description: Azure storage account name (3-24 lowercase alphanumeric chars).

mount_dir.description: Mount path inside the container (e.g. '/mnt/data'). Default: `/mnt/<storage_id>`.

is_output.description: Whether this storage is used for job output.

local_dir.description: Local directory mounted instead of blob storage when using the `local` target backend.

mount_options.description: Additional mount options for blob storage (AML and local backends only, not for Azure Files).

datastore_name.description: Name of an existing AzureML datastore (alternative to storage_account_name).
